title: Funnels and the Customer Journey
shortSummary: Customers do not buy the first time they hear about you. They go through a journey from awareness to consideration to decision. This module teaches you how to map that journey, build marketing funnels, and create the right content and touchpoints at each stage.
whyItMatters: Understanding the customer journey is the difference between random marketing and strategic marketing. When you know where someone is in their buying process, you can give them exactly the right information at the right time. This dramatically increases conversion rates and reduces wasted spend on messages that miss the mark.
coreConcepts: The traditional marketing funnel: awareness, consideration, decision
Why the funnel is actually more like a flywheel
Customer journey mapping: touchpoints, emotions, and decisions
Top of funnel (TOFU), middle of funnel (MOFU), bottom of funnel (BOFU) content
Conversion rate optimisation at each stage
Multi-touch attribution: understanding how channels work together
